name: Stripe
summary: Stripe builds a financial services platform that enables businesses to accept payments, create billing systems, and manage money transfers.

name: Airbnb
summary: Airbnb operates a platform connecting travelers with vacation rentals in 220+ countries.

name: Figma

name: Vercel

name: Scale AI

name: Anthropic

name: Mistral

name: Linear

name: Clerk

name: Supabase

name: Umbra

name: True Anomaly

name: Sierra Space

name: Vast

name: Redwire

name: Axiom Space

name: Apex

name: Turion Space

name: IonQ

name: Rigetti Computing

name: PsiQuantum

name: QuEra Computing
summary: QuEra builds quantum computers based on neutral atoms for research and development.

name: Atom Computing

name: Xanadu
summary: Xanadu builds quantum computing systems used by people globally.

name: Q-CTRL
summary: Q-CTRL develops software to expand quantum computing capabilities and enable quantum sensing solutions for navigation and industrial applications.

name: Quantinuum

name: Classiq
summary: Classiq builds quantum computing software used by developers to design and optimize quantum circuits for complex problem-solving.

name: Helion Energy

name: Commonwealth Fusion

name: Kairos Power

name: Tokamak Energy

name: Covariant

name: Viam

name: Physical Intelligence

name: Machina Labs

name: Cohere

name: Runway

name: d-Matrix

name: Heirloom Carbon

name: Roblox

name: Unity Technologies

name: ElevenLabs

name: Weaviate

name: Larian Studios

name: Docker
